text_excerpt: --> Support Helena | Helena Dollimore MP for Hastings and Rye top of page Sign up to my newsletter! About Helena News Campaigns £21.5 million for Hastings Ashford International petition Empty Shops Petition Bring back our Emergency Vets! GP Survey Bus Survey Under 16's Social Media Survey Faster Trains from Hastings Playground Petition Harrow Lane Community Centre Sir Richard Branson: reopen Ashford! #BinTheBeads Volunteer Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Donate Do you want to support Helena's work in Hastings and Rye? Add your details if you would like us to get in touch with you to join our team of volunteers Keep me updated I understand I can manage my references or unsubscribe at any time by replying to an email or contacting 1066helena@gmail.com . We may use the Information you provide, such as name and postcode, to match the data provided to your electoral register record held on our electoral database, which could inform future communications you receive from us. We may use your answers to help us campaign better. If signing up for an event, we may still use the details provided to contact you specifically about that event. Support Helena as a volunteer Thanks for your help. One of our volunteer team will be in touch. Together we can change Hastings and Rye for the better. Promoted by Helena Dollimore on behalf of Helena Dollimore at 84 Bohemia Road, St Leonards on Sea, TN37 6RN Privacy Policy bottom of page
